scene_1.visual_plan: The scene begins with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera in a softly illuminated bedroom, creating a relatable and cozy mood. After the first spoken line, a quick cut transitions to a close-up of the product held in the model's right hand, highlighting its unique design and texture. The camera then shifts back to the medium shot as the model discusses her experience, clearly showing comfort and confidence. The depth of field is controlled to keep the background slightly blurred, emphasizing the model. As she talks about her newfound ease, there is a cut to a POV shot of the product positioned close to her face, ensuring the audience can connect with her expression of satisfaction and confidence.
scene_1.dialogue: 私はこれをもっと早く試しておくべきだったと後悔しています。
